title: Making the EU ETS fit for Net Zero and resilient in the new era of volatility [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The upcoming review of the European Union Emissions Trading Scheme (EU ETS) in July 2026 is the opportunity for a reform that provides a regulatory framework fit for Net Zero. In line with conclusions of the European Council in March, revisions should both reaffirm the EU ETS’s key role for climate change mitigation, and soften […]
